creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 153854
Makefile with CPE information added

lang/gcc (which devel/powerpc64-gcc is based on) has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2008-1367). This patch add CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
